basic_details.job_title: Central University of Punjab Clerical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Punjab Clerical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 28 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CUPB Clerical Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 30 Years

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Class or equivalent, English Typing @ 35 wpm OR Hindi Typing @ 30 wpm, Proficiency in Computer Operations.
qualification.details: 12th Class or equivalent qualification from a recognized board or university. English Typing @ 35 wpm OR Hindi Typing @ 30 wpm (35wpm and 30 wpm correspond to 10500 KDPH/9000 KDPH on an average of 5 Key depressions for each word) on computer. Time allowed: 10 minutes. Proficiency in Computer Operations such as working knowledge of MS Office, etc.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Clerical Staff at Central University of Punjab?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Clerical Staff positions at Central University of Punjab is scheduled for 11th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clerical Staff post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th Class or an equivalent qualification from a recognized board or university. Additionally, proficiency in computer operations and typing skills are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Clerical Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Clerical Staff positions is between 18 to 30 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clerical Staff position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Clerical Staff post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 29,050/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clerical Staff post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Clerical Staff position at the Central University of Punjab.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC/SC/ST/PWD/Women categories is Rs. 100/-. This fee is to be paid as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Clerical Staff role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Clerical Staff positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for Central University of Punjab Clerical Staff to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Central University of Punjab, Bathinda, Punjab, 151401. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact venue details.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original educational certificates, ID proof, typing test certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any online application process before the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand; they just need to report at the venue on the specified date with all required documents.
